zh.lifeSummary: 當William Lucy於1403年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾哈爾可特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Lucy30歲，母親Alice Hugford16歲。他於1433年與Eleanor Grey在威爾士丹比爾盧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年在英國瓦維其可爾哈爾可特享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Lucy于1403年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾哈爾可特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Lucy30岁，母亲Alice Hugford16岁。他于1433年与Eleanor Grey在威尔士丹比爾盧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年在英国瓦維其可爾哈爾可特享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Lucy was born in 1403, in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Lucy, was 30 and his mother, Alice Hugford, was 16. He married Eleanor Grey in 1433, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1466, in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Lucy est né en 1403, à Charlecote, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Lucy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Hugford, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Grey en 1433, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1466, à Charlecote, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Lucy 1403 in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Lucy 30 und seine Mutter Alice Hugford 16. Er hat 1433 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales Eleanor Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1466 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Lucy è nato il nel 1403 nel Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Lucy, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hugford, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Grey nel 1433, nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1466, nel Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Lucy(이)가 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 찰렉트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Lucy(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hugford(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1433년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 Eleanor Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 영국 워윅실르 찰렉트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Lucy родился в 1403 г. в местности чарлекот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Lucy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Hugford, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Grey в 1433 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
